scope: PR-04 code half of the Presentation Recovery arc: directional windup->impact->recovery action animation. No image production, no gameplay/timing change.
summary: Tool and weapon use no longer plays a uniform three-pose loop that only read rightward. Each item now carries an action_profile (windup/impact/recovery fractions, arc, direction mode) in equipment.json, and player_visual plays a windup -> impact -> recovery cycle whose swing is aimed at the target vector and mirror-aware, so up, down, and diagonal aims read directionally. The pick and axe swing PNGs are drawn rotated toward the aim; the sword, which has no authored frames, uses the same contract via a presentation-only attack_swing timer set when a melee hit lands (damage and timing untouched). presentation_snapshot() now exposes action_kind, action_item, swing_phase_kind, and swing_direction. Remaining swing art (smoother authored arcs, real sword frames) stays in the image matrix.
acceptance: Swing direction follows the target across six aim directions (pr04_swing_direction_follows_target)
Pick and axe differ by their action_profile phases (pr04_action_profile_phases)
Sword drives the same windup->impact->recovery contract with no authored frames (pr04_sword_uses_action_contract)
Mining/combat timing and frame baselines unchanged; presentation-only
Waited-GUI smoke 341/341; validator + capsule_doctor public_repo green
validation: waited-GUI Godot 4.6.1 smoke -> PASS 341/341 (fresh results file)
decisions: Motion is data-owned: items carry an action_profile; BlockRegistry.action_profile merges a default so every item resolves one
swing_direction() is mirror-aware so diagonal/up/down aims read directionally rather than always rightward
The sword uses a presentation-only attack_swing timer on player.gd (set on a landed hit) because it has no authored frames; damage/timing are untouched
New swing art (smoother arcs, sword frames) is deferred to the image matrix (PR-10 lane), not produced here
risks: fq09u1_live_clip_switch cold-profile flakiness persists in the music lane (passed this run)
Sword swing is procedural until authored sword frames land in the art lane
next_action: PR-05 (menu and character-selection preview through the shared render path).
